data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for read-state tracking of in-app style notifications.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the read-state tracking for in-app style notifications, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data related to in-app notifications. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking delivery states, yet there is no evidence of such tracking being implemented or validated in the prior steps. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of read-state tracking for in-app style notifications as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the read-state tracking for in-app notifications.
